sections.paragraph:
κολαβρίζω 1 aor. pass. ἐκολαβρίσθην (Hesychius) mock, ridicule (Suda) 1 Cl 39:9 (Job 5:4).—DELG s.v. κόλαβρο.

aor. aor. = aorist

pass. pass. = passive (either of grammatical form or of passive experience); also used in reference to literary portion=passage

Suda Suda = a lexical work (freq. cited as Suidas in handbooks); X a.d.—List 5

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 554
